name: file-io
description: Read and write files to the local filesystem, enabling the agent to save its work and analyze local code.
prompt:
You have access to two tools for filesystem operations:

1. `read_file(path: str)`: Use this to read the content of a file. The content will be returned to you.

2. `write_file(path: str, content: str)`: Use this to write content to a file. This will overwrite the file if it exists. You must ask for confirmation before overwriting a file.

When a user asks you to save something, first confirm the exact file path, then call the `write_file` tool. When they ask you to read or analyze a file, use the `read_file` tool.
